# pm-onethird product roadmap (1/3-2/3 + Union-Closed compatibility-geometry program)

*Generated by pm-onethird on 2026-07-14 17:00 BST — evening sweep. GATE mg-7d8a LIFTED — Daniel "no gate", full speed. Manual edits will be overwritten next sweep — push back via OVERRIDE mail or by editing the PM config.*

**Scope.** Three repos: union_closed, one_third_width_three, one_third. Tags: onethird, one-third, lean, audit, union-closed, frankl.

**Headline (2026-07-14).** L1b is now HALF closed. The lambda_std transport-certificate route reduced to two halves: **(A) SPREAD is PROVEN** (the centred expected-position vector r has ||r||^2 = Omega(n^3), via the band bound, using only delta<1/3 — not width-3, not monotonicity which is false); **(B) LOCALITY is WALLED** down to a single named correlation inequality, Cross = O(E[inv_e]). So L1b is "one honest lemma from closed," pinned to that one object. mg-8201 (expected-rank certificate) and mg-dbd1 ((A)+(B) doc) both merged. Filed + dispatch-readied **mg-2acf** to attack the (B)-wall (priority 1) and re-routed **mg-4052** (Frankl step-4 probe, priority 2). Two human-action items pending on Daniel (mg-344a conceptual bridge theorem, mg-b8f9 Hopkins outreach). No URGENT signals.

---

## Now (in flight / dispatch-ready)
- **mg-2acf** — high — OneThird L1b (B)-wall: prove Cross = O(E[inv_e]) or structurally explain the L2-vs-L1 gap. Dispatch-ready to mayor (priority 1, live one-third frontier). Latex-first research probe; block-and-report; firm 400k stop-loss (bespoke combinatorics, blowup risk). Verdict binary-leaning: PROVEN closes L1b; RED = pivot signal to the algebraic-program vision. Not yet claimed.
- **mg-4052** — high, budget 350k — Frankl-Alt-Cochain step-4: n=3/n=4 probe of three enriched cohomology hosts (sgn host is 1-dim, F-class only scalar). Dispatch-ready (priority 2, independent union_closed track). Binary GREEN/RED; RED exhausts the sgn-twisted-F-natural angle. Not yet claimed.

## Next (queued)
- Whatever mayor dispatches first of {mg-2acf, mg-4052}. The (B)-wall verdict shapes the next one-third brief; the Frankl step-4 verdict shapes the next union_closed brief.

## Later (contingent)
- **If (B)-wall (mg-2acf) → PROVEN:** L1b closes; L1b feeds the spectral / near-ordinal-sum chain toward the M1 width-3 proof. Close-out audit + Lean follow-on per two-milestones plan.
- **If (B)-wall → RED:** pivot to the algebraic-program vision (parameter-space search over algebraic objects with computable balance constants) — Daniel's stated pivot target.

## Trajectory
- **One-third:** on the certificate route, L1b is one honest lemma (the Cross-term inequality) from closed. Sharp, single, named target — a good state. Risk: it is genuinely-new bespoke combinatorics (FKG/XYZ/Shepp/Fishburn provably insufficient; regime out of empirical reach). Hence the firm stop-loss on mg-2acf and the pre-committed RED→algebraic-program pivot.
- **Frankl/union_closed:** parallel track; step-4 host-enrichment probe (mg-4052) is the live question — does a higher-dim host make the F-induced class non-scalar and fire vision-step-4.
- **Lean health:** one_third = 2 accepted sorries (Dilworth + FKG/layered-balanced axioms, expected). union_closed = 38 first-party sorry/admit occurrences (highest of the three; no baseline — watching). No current CI failures (one_third's April failures are stale; latest main run passed). No releases anywhere (research repos).
